description: Thorough carpet-bombing research to build a comprehensive Greg Abel cognitive framework skill. All research in English, all documents in English.
notes: Leo要求：1.地毯式搜索所有英文资料 2.文档全英文编写 3.长文档必须做核心观点总结并附链接 4.先确认plan再开始

styleGuide.quotes: Always use original English quotes, never translate
styleGuide.sources: Cite original English sources with URLs
styleGuide.skil_mdNote: SKILL.md should be concise (under 300 lines), reference detailed content in references/ files
styleGuide.summaryRule: For documents over 5000 words, provide executive summary + key quotes + source link

researchStrategy.approach: Carpet bombing - multiple parallel searches across different source types
researchStrategy.summary: Long sources must be summarized with key points and source link

tasks.title: Greg Abel Wikipedia - Full Content Extraction
tasks.description: Extract full Wikipedia article on Greg Abel for accurate biographical data
tasks.action: web_fetch https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Greg_Abel
tasks.successCriteria: Complete birth date, education, career timeline, key events
tasks.note: Use full content, extract all facts

tasks.description: Britannica's authoritative profile of Greg Abel
